problem id: 2aa6ce6a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  00100001 -> 10010100
  11101010 -> 01101000
  00000100 -> 00000010
  00011111 -> 10001100
  01101001 -> 10111001
  00101110 -> 00010010
  01110010 -> 00110111
  10110001 -> 11001110
  11000101 -> 11111010

query: 10000011
predicted answer: 11010001
